headline: Quanta Services Weighs US$1b Buyback Against Growth And Valuation Concerns
summary: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) announced that its Board of Directors has authorized a US$1b share repurchase program. The newly approved buyback allows the company to repurchase its common stock over time, subject to market and other conditions. This decision represents a material capital allocation move that can affect earnings per share and ownership mix. Quanta Services focuses on infrastructure solutions for utility, energy, and communications customers, an area that continues to attract...

headline: Quanta Services Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend and New $1 Billion Stock Repurchase Program
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend to stockholders of $0.11 per share, or a rate of $0.44 per share on an annualized basis. The dividend is payable on July 13, 2026, to stockholders of record as of July 1, 2026.

headline: Joseph Kim Joins Quanta Services Board of Directors
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today the appointment of Joseph Kim to the company's Board of Directors. He brings extensive executive-level leadership and operational experience, including supply chain and logistics expertise, to Quanta's board.
